case_title: LEGAL ADDITIONS LLC VS HOROWITZ, HAGAI DBA HOROWITZ & ASSOC.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOROWITZ, HAGAI DBA HOROWITZ & ASSOC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $998.80 FILED BY LEGAL ADDITIONS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HOROWITZ, HAGAI DBA HOROWITZ & ASSOC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOROWITZ, HAGAI DBA HOROWITZ & ASSOC. CONTRACT DATED 4/9/01 AND SIGNED BY THE PARTIES CONTAINS A MEDIATION/BINDING ARBITRATION CLAUSE PARTIES ARE TO MEDIATE/ARBITRATE PURSUANT TO THE CONTRACT TERM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
